en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: uka’ amin nak, ina’ mabaliv ata.
ch: B:我也沒有帶，走我們去買。
en: B: I don’t have it either. Let’s go buy it.

ab: ina’ dan ata baliv vi ispapatas u?
en: A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: u, na mabalivanq cak ki isqaqaisqais.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ina’ mabaliv ata kaunun tingmut, u?
en: A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?
B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: ma’un cak itu kaku’ tu paitutungquvali’.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: madas cak ki timoqus haip, ma’aqi tungquvali’ ka’ muskun ata ma’un.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!
A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let’s go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: kadangazin cak siza’ i iukin, u?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: ma’asikang cak, tupa’i ka Atul tu kadangazin asu siza’.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor and you asked Atul to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don’t you clean up?
B: I’ve finished cleaning up.
A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.
B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: mal’u’ang, ni’ang cak kanaqtung ma’asik iti.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: malkama’aq qa asu maca pal’u’un unisin?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: na muskun cak kaviaz nak tusauc.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: malkama’aq qa naip maca pal’u’unin unisin?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?
B: He’s going swimming.
